# CGPDFDataFormat.JPEG2000

**Case**

The data stream is encoded in JPEG-2000 format.

## Declaration

```swift
case JPEG2000
```

## Constants

- **CGPDFDataFormat.raw**: The data stream is not encoded.
- **CGPDFDataFormat.jpegEncoded**: The data stream is encoded in JPEG format.

items.description: The data stream is not encoded.
